metadata.title: Sailing
metadata.lyrics:
[00:36.45] Well, it's not far down to paradise
[00:40.06] At least it's not for me
[00:42.70] And if the wind is right, you can sail away
[00:46.47] And find tranquility
[00:48.93] Oh, the canvas can do miracles
[00:52.70] Just you wait and see
[00:55.87] Believe me
[01:01.65] It's not far to Never Never Land
[01:05.53] No reason to pretend
[01:08.10] And if the wind is right, you can find the joy
[01:11.85] Of innocence again
[01:14.41] Oh, the canvas can do miracles
[01:18.57] Just you wait and see
[01:21.31] Believe me
[01:25.41] 
[01:28.06] Sailing
[01:30.68] Takes me away to where I've always heard it could be
[01:40.59] Just a dream and the wind to carry me
[01:44.17] Soon I will be free
[01:48.30] 
[01:52.00] Fantasy
[01:54.63] It gets the best of me
[01:57.81] When I'm sailing
[02:02.41] 
[02:04.81] All caught up in the reverie
[02:08.08] Every word is a symphony
[02:10.60] Won't you believe me?
[02:15.03] 
[02:17.55] Sailing
[02:20.25] Takes me away to where I've always heard it could be
[02:30.05] Just a dream and the wind to carry me
[02:33.55] Soon I will be free
[02:37.81] 
[03:06.68] Well, it's not far back to sanity
[03:10.42] At least it's not for me
[03:13.02] And if the wind is right, you can sail away
[03:16.63] And find serenity
[03:19.18] Oh, the canvas can do miracles
[03:23.13] Just you wait and see
[03:25.70] Can't you believe me?
[03:30.18]

[03:45.08] Just a dream and the wind to carry me
[03:48.67] And soon I will be free
